name: sewer-junction
summary: A convergence of sewer tunnels — walkways flank a flowing channel, iron grates drain into the dark, the smell is everywhere.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: cross-shape or T — multiple tunnels meeting

primary_palette.note: classic cross-junction — channel through center, walkways at sides
drainage junction — multiple pipes feeding into floor grates
a plank bridge over the channel — the only way across
half-collapsed junction reclaimed by underworld growth
squatter-occupied junction, a beggar or smuggler has made camp

story_prompts: a working city sewer junction, rats everywhere, torches at intervals
a smuggler's transfer point — boxes waiting, a boat at the channel
a blocked junction where the sewage is backing up into the tunnels
flooded junction after rain, walkways submerged
ancient junction predating the city above, the channel runs to somewhere older

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: wet dim (0.15-0.3), light reflects on water

anti_patterns: don't forget the channel — a sewer junction without flowing sewage is just a room
don't use dry floor textures throughout; show the wet
avoid fine furniture unless it's out of place on purpose (a dumped desk, a stolen chair)
